turns.speaker: Eunsu
turns.text:
You’ll be traveling to Pittsburgh as a group of three: you two, plus Minsik’s friend. His flight arrives at 9:00 AM, and from then on, you two should make a plan for how to spend the day in Pittsburgh. Since he’ll be leaving the next morning, you only need to plan for that one day. His hotel is near Pitt, so please keep that in mind when making the itinerary. Minsik’s friend has the following preferences, and since all three of you will be traveling together, make sure to reflect your own travel styles as well.

preference of Minsik’s friend:
1. Likes scenic spots and neighborhoods that are nice for walking
2. Wants to try at least one popular local food place
3. Prefers a relaxed schedule rather than rushing between too many places

You’re allowed to google search, but do not use LLMs!
Example for the preference type (that you may be considering)

- Budget
- Transportation
- Food preferences
- Must-visit places
- Places to avoid
- Preferred pace
- Indoor vs. outdoor
